creator: marcelesperante@yahoo.com.br
text: I'm new to FreeBSD. I'm virtualizing a FreeBsd 13.0-2 machine on Ubuntu 22.04.2 LTS (GNU/Linux 5.15.90.1-microsoft-standard-WSL2 x86_64) under WSL2 the base operating system is Win 11. I use virt-manager and everything runs fine until I try to upload a Window Manager, the mouse doesn't work in any (CDE, Motif) not even in TWM which is Xorg's default. The mouse appears on the screen but the buttons don't click, does anyone have any idea what happens? I already configured xorg.conf to recognize the mouse.
